metadata.thoughts:
**Ensuring accurate output format**

I see that the system needs the "strike_extraction" format, which includes the fields isStrike and strikeData. When isStrike is false, I can either omit strikeData or set it to null. The example given is simply {"isStrike": false}, so I’ll make sure to match that exactly. I want to keep it concise, with no extra commentary, and just deliver the required format. Got it!
